  y_counts = Hash.new(0)

    y = p[1]

      a << a_val
    else
      a << 0
    end
  end

  total = a.sum
  sum_sq = a.map { |x| x * x }.sum

  result = (total * total - sum_sq) * inv_2 % MOD
  (result + MOD) % MOD
end

  inv_2 = (MOD + 1) / 2 # 500000004

  y_counts = Hash.new(0)
  points.each do |p|
    y = p[1]

  result = (total * total - sum_sq) * inv_2 % MOD
  (result + MOD) % MOD
end
